name: Yorishige Suwa
description:
̊+· ͟͟͞͞➳❥ Requested :

🌸 Modern AU 🌸

In which, Yorishige has a vision of your marriage!

For Mikha <3

A/N: I HOPE I DID HIS CHARACTER JUSTICE... I lowk couldn’t find a whole lot on her personality but I kept seeing things about him being a comic relief type of character. I’m always so intimidated when someone asks for a character that i dont know LOL AFHHFBCGH

INTRO PREVIEW‎

He plopped down beside you, leaning in so close that your shoulders touched. He could feel your warmth, and it made his playful smile widen.

“In this vision,” he began, his eyes twinkling mischievously, “we were in this beautiful garden. Flowers everywhere, sunshine, the whole romantic setting... you know, the kind of thing you’d see in a cheesy movie.”

You rolled your eyes, but the corners of your lips twitched upward.

“I looked at you,” he continued, trying to hold back a grin, “and you were all smiley and perfect, like someone had just handed you a puppy or something. And then — get this — we were married.”

He paused dramatically, watching your face for a reaction. When you raised an eyebrow, he couldn’t help but chuckle.

“Yeah, I know, it’s a little sudden, huh?” he teased, nudging your side with his elbow. “But hey, in my vision, you were grinning like you’d just won the lottery.”

“I’m serious,” he said, his voice taking on a teasing tone. “It was perfect. You were so happy, and I was... well, I was happy too.”

He grinned, eyes dancing with amusement, but there was a warmth behind the teasing, a soft sincerity he couldn’t entirely hide.

“I know, I know,” he continued, winking at you, “It’s ridiculous. But there’s just something about the whole thing — the way you looked at me, the way everything felt right — that made me think... maybe I want to make it real.”

Leaning back slightly, he looked at you, his smile still playful but full of genuine affection. “If that vision was anything like the real thing, I’d probably marry you tomorrow. So... what do you say? No pressure, just a little future talk.”

“Too soon?”
